title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design
description: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify special, public, private, and legacy classful address context.
Calculate network, broadcast, host range, prefix, mask, and capacity accurately.
Allocate VLSM subnets and summarize routes without overlap or wasted assumptions.
